headline: NASA will wear high-tech Prada long johns to the Moon
summary: NASA's Artemis IV astronauts will wear Prada-designed Liquid Cooling and Ventilation Garments (LCVG). This high-tech base layer, created with Axiom Space, will keep crew cool under spacesuits. The LCVG is essential for the 2028 Moon mission.

headline: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 delivered a surprisingly hectic and impactful event. Major announcements showcased industry strength despite challenging times. Keynotes largely focused on game reveals, avoiding hardware details.

headline: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: Atlus confirmed Persona 6 with a brief teaser at Summer Game Fest. This announcement marks the long-awaited return of the popular JRPG series. Details remain scarce, building anticipation among fans.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft unveiled a special edition Xbox Series X to celebrate its 25th anniversary. The console and controller feature a distinctive translucent green design. This aesthetic harks back to the original Xbox's iconic look.

headline: Esports Manager 2026 Announces Release Date
summary: Esports Manager 2026 officially announced its release date at IGN Live 2026. The new management simulation game is highly anticipated by esports fans. Further details on the launch were revealed during the event.

headline: How Gothic Remake Works to Give You an Especially Immersive Open World
summary: THQ Nordic discussed the Gothic Remake's immersive open world at IGN Live 2026. The original Gothic celebrates its 25th anniversary, known for its unique and enduring mechanics. The remake aims for an 'alive' and deeply immersive experience.

headline: 1666: Amsterdam Creator on the Game's Timelines... and Playing as a Cat!
summary: Creator Patrice Désilets discussed 1666: Amsterdam at IGN Live after a playable demo release. The game endured a 15-year development and a lengthy legal battle for its rights. Players can look forward to unique elements, including playing as a cat.

headline: Star Wars: Zero Company Creators Talk Canon, Character Customization and More
summary: Creators discussed Star Wars: Zero Company at IGN Live after its story trailer debut. It's a single-player turn-based tactics game set during the Clone Wars. The game explores 'the war beneath the war,' focusing on politics and backroom dealings.

headline: How the High Street became a window on our political instability
summary: The decline of the UK High Street offers a stark reflection of political instability. Recent years have seen significant changes impacting traditional retail spaces. Their current state provides insights into broader national challenges.

headline: Christian Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
summary: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark's friendly match against Ukraine. The Danish Football Association confirmed he is now conscious. His condition is stable following the concerning incident on the field.

headline: Zelensky's close European allies set out five conditions for peace talks
summary: Zelensky's staunch European allies presented five key conditions for peace talks. This comes after a meeting amid a reported shift in US focus towards Iran. The move signals a concerted effort for a resolution to the conflict.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S has introduced a new traineeship program targeting 1,000 young individuals. The scheme aims to address the growing challenge of youth not in employment, education, or training. It represents a significant investment in developing young talent.
